error.keyword_groups_required: keywordGroups array is required. Format: [{groupName, keywords}].
error.category_required: category array is required. Format: [{name, param:["category code"]}].
error.category_code_required: categoryCode field is required (field name is "categoryCode", e.g., "50000000"). Main categories: 50000000=Fashion, 50000003=Digital, 50000006=Food.
error.category_code_required_breakdown: categoryCode field is required (field name is "categoryCode"). Main codes: 50000000=Fashion, 50000003=Digital, 50000006=Food.
error.keyword_array_required: keyword array is required. Format: [{name, param:["keyword"]}].
